creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 151970
x11-themes/kde-icons-lime-rade8 fixes MASTER_SITES

x11-themes/kde-icons-lime-rade8
fixes MASTER_SITES as reported by:
http://beefy1.isc.freebsd.org/bulk/93i386-default/latest/logs/errors/kde-icons-lime-rade8-3.1.log
and
http://portsmon.FreeBSD.org/portoverview.py?category=x11-themes&portname=kde-icons-lime-rade8

There appears to be an issue with the SF logic, *not* this port, itself.

Please find svn diff, and QA session, attached, confirming this.

Thanks.

--Chris
